examples: A few years back, Stochastics was the hottest technical indicator in town.
Stochastics track the positioning of daily closing prices within the daily range.
In the study of continuous time finance market modeling, the theory and methods of stochastics have been one of important research tools.
Weekly Stochastics have not established a bullish crossover, yet remain in an oversold situation.
The downtrend reversed on October 8, confirmed by rising stochastics and a relative strength index rebounding from oversold territory.
